introduction.title: An Exceptional Edition
introduction.content1: The 2026 edition of the SUMI JO International Singing Competition takes place in a doubly exceptional context. This year marks the celebration of 40 years of Sumi Jo's international career, the world-renowned Korean soprano whose crystalline voice and virtuosity have conquered the greatest opera stages.
introduction.content2: Simultaneously, 2026 celebrates 140 years of Franco-Korean friendship, a diplomatic and cultural relationship that has united our two nations since 1886. This double commemoration makes our competition much more than a musical event: it becomes the living symbol of an artistic dialogue between East and West.
introduction.content3: At Château de la Ferté-Imbault, from July 5 to 11, 2026, we will welcome the most brilliant lyrical talents from around the world. This historic edition promises to be an exceptional moment, where artistic excellence meets cultural heritage, and where the voices of tomorrow rise in the continuity of a tradition of excellence.

tour.title: The 2024 winners on tour with Sumi Jo
tour.dates:
Concert dates and venues:
June 10, 2025: Shijiazhuang, China
June 12, 2025: Shenzhen, China
June 19, 2025: Jeonju, South Korea
June 21, 2025: Seongnam, South Korea
June 22, 2025: Seoul, South Korea
June 24, 2025: Chuncheon, South Korea
tour.description: Since the competition, the winners have developed their careers with continuous support from Sumi Jo and her team. This exceptional tour has offered them international visibility alongside the world-renowned soprano, including press conferences and television appearances.

harmony.label: An exceptional venue
harmony.title: Le Château de la Ferté-Imbault
harmony.subtitle: OPEN TO ALL VOCAL CATEGORIES AND ALL COUNTRIES WORLDWIDE
harmony.content1: Located in the Loire Valley less than two hours from Paris and built on foundations dating back to 980 AD, the estate of La Ferté-Imbault features a remarkably preserved ensemble from the 16th and 17th centuries, including the main château, the outbuildings, the pavilions, the moats, the double terrace, the gardens and the park. Completed in 1627 and presenting a harmonious composition of architecture and landscape, its design is a manifest synthesis of its history: both a fortress (hence the name Ferté) with an imposing silhouette evocative of a glorious military past, and an elegant château with large windows and sculpted facades revealing all the refinement of the Renaissance spirit and the Age of Enlightenment.

sumijo.title: SUMI JO
sumijo.subtitle: WORLD-RENOWNED SOPRANO
sumijo.content1: During 36 years of an exceptionally rich and successful career, she has been praised continuously, both by the press and by audiences, for the remarkable musicality of her voice, her agility, precision and the purity of her tone.
sumijo.content2: She has performed in the most important opera houses and theaters around the world and is one of the classical artists who has sold the most records in the history of music, with more than 50 recordings to her credit including several platinum records rewarding one million copies.
sumijo.content3: Miss Jo first studied in her native country before joining the Conservatory of the Accademia di Santa Cecilia in Rome, from which she graduated with honors in 1986. The numerous accolades she has received include the International Puccini award and first prize at the international competitions of Seoul, Enna, Barcelona, Naples and Verona.
sumijo.content4: She was one of the favorite singers of Maestro Herbert von Karajan, named conductor of the Century in 1986, and of Sir Georg Solti for whom she recorded a Woman Without a Shadow rewarded with a Grammy Award and an unforgettable Queen of the Night in The Magic Flute.

event1.description: MISS JO WINS THE GRAMMY AWARD FOR PRINCIPAL SOLOIST IN THE BEST OPERA RECORDING FOR RICHARD STRAUSS' "DIE FRAU OHNE SCHATTEN".

event2.description: SHE RECEIVES FROM MR MATSUURA, DIRECTOR GENERAL OF UNESCO, THE TITLE "UNESCO ARTIST FOR PEACE".

event3.description: CELEBRATING 30 YEARS OF CAREER, SHE PERFORMS CHINESE, AMERICAN, AUSTRALIAN AND EUROPEAN TOURS. THE SONG SHE PERFORMS IN SORRENTINO'S FILM "YOUTH" IS NOMINATED FOR A GOLDEN GLOBE AND AN ACADEMY AWARD.

event4.description: ON JULY 15, SUMI JO OFFICIALLY LAUNCHES THE FIRST INTERNATIONAL SINGING COMPETITION BEARING HER NAME.

festival.title: FESTIVAL & VOCATION
festival.intro: Driven by the desire that her journey and passion can serve to inspire, support and reveal the talents of other artists, Miss Jo creates with the SUMI JO INTERNATIONAL SINGING COMPETITION a new kind of festival closer to the public and artists, based on three key values.

ambition.title: AMBITION
ambition.content: Through different formats, auditions, concerts, masterclasses, the week aims to share musical culture in all its beauty and diversity with as wide an audience as possible.

transmission.title: TRANSMISSION
transmission.content: As Miss Jo herself learned from her extraordinary successive mentors, the sharing of experience and passion is fundamental to perpetuate artistic excellence.

emotion.title: EMOTION
emotion.content: SJISC participants will benefit from an exceptionally romantic and privileged environment conducive to inspiration and artistic excellence.

sponsorship.title: PARTNERS & SPONSORS
sponsorship.intro: Becoming a partner or sponsor of the competition represents a unique opportunity to align your brand with artistic excellence and actively contribute to a cultural event of global scope.

visibility.title: International Visibility
visibility.description: Elevate your brand's prestige internationally. Benefit from targeted media exposure and enhanced brand image through extensive visibility across all our communication platforms.

engagement.title: Loyalty and Engagement
engagement.description: Strengthen your customer and partner relationships. Differentiate your company through artistic excellence and cultural commitment, demonstrating deep engagement in cultural development.

vip.title: Exclusive VIP Experiences
vip.description: Offer your key clients and partners a unique immersion in the world of art: best concert seats, private meetings with world-renowned artists, and access to rehearsals.

networking.title: Media Coverage & Networking
networking.description: Enjoy national and international media coverage. Strategic networking with influential personalities from the cultural world and exclusive events to forge new alliances.

support.title: Support Methods
support.subtitle: Three ways to support us and contribute to the success of this exceptional competition

financial.title: Financial Support
financial.description: Contribute financially to the competition with attractive tax benefits

inKind.title: In-Kind Support
inKind.description: Provide your contribution through services or material goods

skills.title: Skills-Based Support
skills.description: Share your expertise and professional skills

cta.title: Join Us
cta.description: We are at your complete disposal to discuss partnership opportunities and build together a project tailored to your objectives.

chateau.title: Château de la Ferté-Imbault
chateau.subtitle: An exceptional setting in the heart of Sologne

description.paragraph1: Nestled in the heart of Sologne, the Château de la Ferté-Imbault is an architectural jewel from the 16th century. This exceptional venue combines the elegance of its Renaissance architecture with the natural beauty of its 30-hectare park, offering a unique setting for international cultural events.
description.paragraph2: Listed as a Historic Monument, the château has been meticulously restored to preserve its authentic character while providing modern infrastructure. Its state rooms, chapel, and French gardens constitute a perfect setting to host the competition and its associated events.

location.title: Location
location.description: 2 hours from Paris, in the heart of Sologne, in a preserved natural setting

history.title: History
history.description: 16th-century historic monument, witness to French history

capacity.title: Capacity
capacity.description: Concert halls, state rooms, and spaces for masterclasses

heritage.title: Heritage
heritage.description: Renaissance architecture and listed French gardens

gardens.title: The Gardens
gardens.description: The château's French gardens offer an enchanting setting for outdoor concerts and moments of conviviality among participants. Carefully restored, they present a perfect harmony between historical heritage and lush nature.
features: Panoramic view of the Sologne ponds

president.name: Sumi Jo
president.bio: World-renowned soprano, Sumi Jo has graced the international opera stage for over 36 years with her exceptional voice. She has performed in the world's greatest venues and has sold over 50 recordings, including several platinum albums. UNESCO Artist for Peace, she was the favorite singer of Maestro Herbert von Karajan and won a Grammy Award for her performance in Richard Strauss' 'Die Frau ohne Schatten'.

operowicz.name: Olivier Ojzerowicz-Medinger
operowicz.role:
Jury President
Owner of Château de la Ferté-Imbault
operowicz.bio:
Jury President and owner of Château de la Ferté-Imbault.
Passionate about promoting young talent, he works to create exceptional opportunities for emerging artists in the prestigious setting of Château de la Ferté-Imbault.

friend.name: Jonathan Friend
friend.role: Music Consultant at the Metropolitan Opera and Irish National Opera
friend.bio: Internationally renowned music consultant, Jonathan Friend brings his expertise to the Metropolitan Opera in New York and the Irish National Opera. His discerning eye and deep knowledge of the operatic repertoire make him a valuable jury member.

galoppini.name: Alessandro Galoppini
galoppini.bio: As Casting Manager of the prestigious Teatro alla Scala in Milan, Alessandro Galoppini is at the heart of discovering and selecting the world's finest operatic talents. His experience in one of the world's most demanding opera houses makes him an essential expert.

lanceron.name: Alain Lanceron
lanceron.role: President of Warner Classics and Erato
lanceron.bio: President of Warner Classics and Erato, Alain Lanceron is a major figure in the classical music industry. His artistic vision and expertise in world-class recording production enrich the jury with unique perspectives on musical careers.

rhorer.name: Jérémie Rhorer
rhorer.role: Conductor, composer and director of Le Cercle de l'Harmonie
rhorer.bio: Conductor, composer and artistic director of Le Cercle de l'Harmonie, Jérémie Rhorer is internationally recognized for his innovative approach to baroque and classical music. His profound musical understanding brings an essential artistic dimension to the jury.

vargas.name: Ramón Vargas
vargas.bio: Internationally renowned Mexican tenor, Ramón Vargas has performed on the world's greatest operatic stages. His exceptional career and mastery of bel canto make him an ideal mentor to guide and evaluate young talent.
